# Mindovo

Mindovo is an Indian brand of premium, screen-free games and puzzles for families, friends, gifting, and game nights. Mindovo is part of the House of Fashion Dux, established in 2018.

## Official pages

- https://mindovo.com/ — Mindovo games and puzzles
- https://mindovo.com/products — product catalogue
- https://mindovo.com/products/jigsaw-puzzle — Mindovo 300-piece jigsaw puzzle (₹799)
- https://mindovo.com/products/bollywood-battle — Bollywood Battle party trivia card game (₹999)
- https://mindovo.com/faq — frequently asked questions
- https://mindovo.com/about — brand and company information
- https://mindovo.com/reviews — customer testimonials and ratings

## Products

- **Mindovo Jigsaw Puzzle** — A premium 300-piece jigsaw puzzle with eco-friendly recycled blueboard, velvet-touch anti-glare matte finish, zone-letter sorting system on the back of every piece, and a luxury rigid gift box with gold foil detailing. Dimensions: 45×30 cm. Suitable for ages 8–99. Price: ₹799. Available on Amazon India (ASIN: B0DJSAWPUZ) and fashiondux.com. Rating: 4.9/5 (86 reviews).

- **Bollywood Battle** — A Bollywood trivia party card game with 220 premium linen-finish cards featuring dialogues, acting challenges, and iconic film trivia. Game modes: Classic Trivia, Guess the Hook, Dumb Charades. For 3–12 players, ages 14+. Playtime: 30–45 min. Price: ₹999. Available on Amazon India. Rating: 4.9/5 (42 reviews).

## Parent Company & Sister Brands

- **Fashion Dux** (parent) — Founded 2018. 100,000+ eyewear customers on Amazon India. Website: https://fashiondux.com
- **OTTAVO** (sister brand) — Market-leading seller of premium Guardian bells and keychains on Amazon India.

## Contact

- Website: https://mindovo.com/
- Email: support@mindovo.in
- Phone: +91 99252 12340
- Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India
